dataset: University of Michigan Real-life Deception Detection
owner: OpenAI Codex. Scope: T1 expressed affect, Pillars 1 and 3.
archive_integrity: valid ZIP; 121 MP4 clips, 121 transcripts, one gesture-annotation CSV
label_provenance: official page/paper describe trial-outcome and investigation-based deceptive/truthful labels
subject_split_status: blocked for valid modeling: the archive exposes trial filename IDs but no clip-to-speaker mapping; the paper reports 56 unique speakers, so subject-held-out folds cannot be reconstructed from the acquired files
rights_status: research-only acquisition; the archive contains third-party court-trial media and exposes no machine-readable redistribution/commercial license; media is not mirrored to B2
model_status: no model fit; no AUROC/AUPRC/Brier/ECE claim
disposition: acquired metadata/media locally for research audit; request source speaker mapping and rights clarification before any subject/source-disjoint benchmark
